segments.text: With the slow duration cut down
segments.original_text: スローの時間が短くなったので

segments.text: There's definitely that read we'd want to anticipate ahead of time, but...
segments.original_text: そこも見越してみたいなところはあったんですけど

segments.text: Tama P's also going pretty far with it...
segments.original_text: たまPもかなりどこまで
その先を見ているお利用者
ウィッチタイムスロー

full_text: With the slow duration cut down, there's definitely that read we'd want to anticipate ahead of time, but... Tama P's also going pretty far with it... Yeah, exactly. Looking ahead there, Witch Time slow didn't connect

corrections.original: グウェーチュースロー
corrections.corrected: ウィッチタイムスロー
